name: First Touch for Meta Quest Touch Pro controllers

reviews.review_description: I tried to install the game and it won't download
Is the only thing to paint Mona Lisa but it fun
the hieght adjustment of the game sucks. It makes me very high i cant even reach the tools. I cant even get past he tutorial. Please fix this
It wont let me do other painting but it is fun
the game is good but when i try to hit the painting that's like on the top of the rope thing its SO hard to hit i m very mad can u please put it in a different spot its very annoying
Unfortunately I can't get exact gray and the yellow just turns white for no reason and you don't see the full example
Is the Mona Lisa the only painting you can color or is there more?

reviews.review_title: Best game I have ever played in 10 days
reviews.review_description: But now, seriously, this is actually really good and really realistic play it and the good part is it’s free
I love this game best game ever all i got to say

The controls work real well on my Quest 3 and its very relaxing.  

.. why do people keep calling this a game?   It's not a game.  "Ohh horrible game.  All u do is sit and paint"  🙄🙄

reviews.review_title: It starts of so nice but then...
reviews.review_description: The game seemed so good but the colours don't blend, there's always white on the brush when you try to paint? The colours tend to not look like the colour you chose. Personally wouldn't recommend :(

developer_response.body: This is actually not a game, but a tutorial to learn how to use the Oculus Quest Pro Touch controllers. If you want to paint, we'd suggest you try out Painting VR ! Thanks

reviews.review_description:
I like painting in stuff but have different things to paint and it gives me a tutorial every time I get onto this game and it sucks 


Don’t recommend. Just paint irl if your not lazy

developer_response.body: This is actually not a game, but a tutorial to learn how to use the Oculus Quest Pro Touch controllers. And that's the reason  why you get a tutorial every time.  If you want to paint, we'd suggest you try out Painting VR ! Thanks

reviews.review_description: I like it though it’s realistic lol

reviews.review_title: I thought this was the full game
reviews.review_description: I thought this was the full game because itndid not say anything about being a demo!

This is a great little demo of what is possible. It's well done, the studio is lovely and relaxing, and the graphics are superb. 
Because of this demo, I paid for 'paintingVR'..

And within an hour, requested a refund.

PaintingVR just didn't seem as well done. And the backdrop?! The studio? A big old indoor ugly skatepark?? Why would I want to paint in that place? It's not pretty or relaxing?!

Also, the controls are much more finicky and annoying.

I've read that both apps are done by the same person?

So how can this little free game be so much better than the paid game PaintingVR??

Anyway, it is. So that's my review.
Shame you don't get a blank canvas to play around with. That's why it's missing one star.

I loved this demo so much, it was super relaxing and felt really natural. The resolution was superb, the colors felt nice and natural, the motion of squeezing out paint was great, the way that paint interacts with different angles of the brush, and overall it just felt polished and perfect. I bought PaintingVR expecting the same experience but more open, but somehow it feels a bit less polished. Don't get me wrong, I still love paintingVR and what it stands for, but seeing as how this is the same studio it confuses me why this game feels so much more polished. I really hope that the polish of this experience is indicative of what PaintingVR will become soon with updates. I'm aware this is supposed to be a review of this game, but I think that this sentiment is relevant due to the prompt to continue in PaintingVR.

reviews.review_title: I Doubt It's The Game, It's Me
reviews.review_description: This is my very first experience with VR and using the controllers. I am having a terrible time in getting them to work. I sure wish there was a written explanation of how to do this little tutorial. I have tried myriads of times but just not getting the hang of it. Is there anything written down to which I could refer as to exactly how to do it? Sorry, I am of the older generation and thought this would be the best first simple one to try but not so for me. Thanks.

developer_response.body: This is a tutorial for the Quest Pro Touch Controllers. Do you have these?

reviews.review_description: Definitely a must try. Surprised how well it tracks to put the paint exactly where I want it to be. Like the amount of options.

developer_response.body: Definitely check out Painting VR for the full experience!

reviews.review_description: It could have been worse
Good morning
